problem id: 56b1a67b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  10010111 -> 01000100
  11111011 -> 11101110
  10111011 -> 11101110
  01100010 -> 10001000
  10111010 -> 10101010
  01000111 -> 00010001
  10011110 -> 00100010
  10000001 -> 00000000

query: 00101011
predicted answer: 10001000
